title: Textbook Content Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter in textbook content Markdown files.

chapter_id.description: The sequential number of the chapter in the textbook.

chapter_title.description: The official name of the chapter.

synopsis.description: A brief overview of the chapter's focus.

metadata.description: Metadata elements outlined at the start of the chapter.

inti_pati_pembelajaran.description: List of core learning objectives for the chapter.

kemahiran_pemikiran_sejarah.description: List of historical thinking skills applied in the chapter.

elemen_kewarganegaraan_dan_sivik.description: List of civic and citizenship elements focused on in the chapter.
